baseStyles.boxShadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 0px 0px 2px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.19) 0px 0px 14px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px -1px 0.4px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px 1px 0.4px 0px inset
baseStyles.transition: background-image 0.2s, background-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s ease-in-out, transform 0.1s ease-in-out

boxShadow.from: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 0px 0px 2px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.19) 0px 0px 14px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px -1px 0.4px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px 1px 0.4px 0px inset
boxShadow.to: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px -1px 0.4px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px 1px 0.4px 0px inset, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 0px 0px 2px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.19) 0px 0px 14px 0px

boxShadow.from: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 0px 0px 2px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.19) 0px 0px 14px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px -1px 0.4px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px 1px 0.4px 0px inset
boxShadow.to: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px -1px 0.4px 0px inset, rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px 1px 0.4px 0px inset, rgb(244, 244, 244) 0px 0px 0px 2px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 0px 0px 2px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.19) 0px 0px 14px 0px
